Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\),p=''d:/lvguanjia/index.html'',a=s=>fs.appendFileSync\(p,s+''\\n'',''utf8''\);a\(''var canvas=document.getElementById\(""leaf-canvas""\);''\);a\(''var ctx=canvas.getContext\(""2d""\);''\);a\(''var leaves=[];''\);a\(''function resize\(\){canvas.width=canvas.offsetWidth;canvas.height=canvas.offsetHeight;}''\);a\(''window.addEventListener\(""resize"",resize\);resize\(\);''\);a\(''function rand\(a,b\){return a+Math.random\(\)*\(b-a\);}''\);a\(''function mkLeaf\(\){return{x:rand\(0,canvas.width\),y:rand\(-canvas.height,0\),sz:rand\(10,26\),vy:rand\(0.6,2.2\),vx:rand\(-0.6,0.6\),rot:rand\(0,Math.PI*2\),rs:rand\(-0.02,0.02\),op:rand\(0.2,0.55\),sw:rand\(0.3,1.0\),so:rand\(0,Math.PI*2\)};}''\);a\(''for\(var i=0;i<38;i++\){var l=mkLeaf\(\);l.y=rand\(0,canvas.height\);leaves.push\(l\);}''\);a\(''function drawLeaf\(l,t\){''\);a\(''  ctx.save\(\);''\);a\(''  ctx.globalAlpha=l.op;''\);a\(''  ctx.translate\(l.x+Math.sin\(t*0.5+l.so\)*18*l.sw,l.y\);''\);a\(''  ctx.rotate\(l.rot\);''\);a\(''  ctx.fillStyle=""#52b788"";''\);a\(''  ctx.beginPath\(\);''\);a\(''  ctx.moveTo\(0,-l.sz/2\);''\);a\(''  ctx.bezierCurveTo\(l.sz/2,-l.sz/2,l.sz/2,l.sz/2,0,l.sz/2\);''\);a\(''  ctx.bezierCurveTo\(-l.sz/2,l.sz/2,-l.sz/2,-l.sz/2,0,-l.sz/2\);''\);a\(''  ctx.fill\(\);''\);a\(''  ctx.restore\(\);''\);a\(''}''\);console.log\(''js2 ok'',fs.statSync\(p\).size\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\),p=''d:/lvguanjia/index.html'',a=s=>fs.appendFileSync\(p,s+''\\n'',''utf8''\);a\(''var t=0;''\);a\(''function loop\(\){''\);a\(''  ctx.clearRect\(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height\);''\);a\(''  t+=0.016;''\);a\(''  leaves.forEach\(function\(l\){''\);a\(''    l.y+=l.vy;''\);a\(''    l.rot+=l.rs;''\);a\(''    if\(l.y>canvas.height+30\){l.y=rand\(-80,-20\);l.x=rand\(0,canvas.width\);}''\);a\(''    drawLeaf\(l,t\);''\);a\(''  }\);''\);a\(''  requestAnimationFrame\(loop\);''\);a\(''}''\);a\(''loop\(\);''\);a\(''}\)\(\);''\);a\(''<\\/script>''\);a\(''</body></html>''\);console.log\(''done'',fs.statSync\(p\).size\);")
